name: dev-core
description: Codex-native development entrypoints and orchestration for decision grilling, evidence-backed planning, resumable execution, TDD, review, verification, and continuous learning.

interface.shortDescription: TDD, verification, review, and architecture workflows.
interface.longDescription: Dev Core packages Codex-native entrypoint skills for decision grilling, evidence-backed design planning, resumable plan execution, TDD, debugging, review, refactoring, Playwright E2E, checkpoints, verification loops, frontend and backend architecture patterns, and continuous improvement. Narrow skills trigger day-to-day workflows while dev-workflow keeps shared autonomy and escalation gates centralized. Bundled hooks block destructive commands and safely surface active plan paths at session start, versioned eval-ready cases receive deterministic schema and skill-reference validation, and ready-made custom agent roles ship as assets.
defaultPrompt: Use $dev-task to draft a design and TDD plan.
Use $dev-grill to pressure-test a material decision before planning.
Use $dev-execute to implement this plan through review gates.
Use $dev-review to review this change with dev-core criteria.
